title: Sashimi-cut Uruguayan Horseradish Solo-Dinner
description: A yeasty, bouncy-qq solo-dinner featuring horseradish and sashimi-cut technique, inspired by Uruguayan cuisine and Mediterranean flavors.

ingredients.name: uruguayan-style chouriço
ingredients.notes: cut into thin slices for sashimi-style presentation

instructions: Soften active dry yeast in warm water for 5-10 minutes, or until frothy.
Transfer yeast mixture to a large mixing bowl.
Add sliced chouriço and stir to combine.
Add minced garlic and stir to combine.
Add lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Transfer mixture to a serving plate or individual plates.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Just before serving, sprinkle fresh parsley over the top and serve with uruguayan-style chimichurri on the side.
Garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
